render_event_cases.name: command-output-stays-readable
render_event_cases.expected_output: Show only the top command line in the transcript. Hide the noisy process-list output underneath.

event.text:
Ran ps ax | rg "/Users/bartimaeus/pentacle/node_modules/electron/dist/Electron.app/Contents/MacOS/Electron \\.|chat_streamd.py --port 7791"
└ 13767   ??  SN     0:06.07 /Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.13/Resources/Python.app/Contents/MacOS/Python -u chat_streamd.py --port 7791 --bind 0.0.0.0
  --host bart --host abra --host amaterasu

render_event_cases.name: code-edit-collapses-to-first-line
render_event_cases.expected_output: Show a compact change pill with the edited file path only. Hide the patch hunk details.

render_event_cases.name: normal-assistant-text-stays-text
render_event_cases.expected_output: Render the assistant sentence as normal transcript text, not as a pill or button-style chip.

event.text: I’m checking the workspace for anything related to foreclosure scrapers so I can answer from the actual code, not guesswork.

body_cases.name: working-status-line-hidden-from-transcript
body_cases.expected_output: Hide the raw Working(...) status line from the transcript body. The working state should live in the badge/timer area instead.
body_cases.text: • Working (2m 08s • esc to interrupt) · 3 background terminals running · /ps to view · /stop to close

body_cases.name: pending-block-keeps-user-facing-label
body_cases.expected_output: Render a readable queued label plus the pending message body.
body_cases.text:
Messages to be submitted after next tool call (press esc to interrupt and send immediately)
↳ fix the timer

body_cases.name: explored-block-stays-readable
body_cases.expected_output: Keep the Explored label plus the indented file detail block. Do not collapse it into a generic change pill.
body_cases.text:
Explored
└ Read app.js

summary_cases.name: command-summary-allowed-in-sidebar
summary_cases.expected_output: Sidebar detail can keep the top command line when it is useful context.

composer_cases.name: remote-terminal-draft-mirrors-into-composer
composer_cases.expected_output: Composer should mirror the remote in-progress draft when the user has not started a local edit yet.

composer_cases.expected: I’m checking the renderer path against the websocket state now.

composer_cases.name: local-composer-text-wins
composer_cases.remote_draft: I’m checking the renderer path against the websocket state now.
composer_cases.expected_output: Composer should show the local draft exactly.

composer_cases.name: cleared-local-composer-stays-empty-until-remote-clears
composer_cases.remote_draft: I’m checking the renderer path against the websocket state now.
composer_cases.expected_output: Once the user clears the chat bar locally, it should stay empty instead of snapping the remote draft back in.

working_time_cases.name: extracts-working-time-from-bulleted-line

status_cases.name: working-with-timer-and-pending
status_cases.expected_output: Show only the working badge with timer once execution starts, even if a stale pending flag is still present.

status_cases.name: waiting-without-timer
status_cases.expected_output: Show only the waiting badge with no timer text.
